{"parentUuid":"450bb191-4bf8-4804-8e9a-82fde1396197","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01CvztDokrfiEyzu3S661K13","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Confirmed — the controller takes only `page`/`limit` and scopes strictly to `token.locationId`. **The API is wired correctly; it's a location-scoping behavior, not a bug.**\n\nHere's the precise situation:\n- `GET /reviews` returns **only the currently-selected location's** reviews (`review.locationId = token.locationId`).\n- You're on **STUDIO11 Master Location (id 1)**, which has no reviews of its own. The review data in the DB belongs to **branch** locations.\n- Unlike **Tickets** and **Customers** (which have a `master` flag so the corporate/location-1 user sees *all* locations), the reviews endpoint has **no such \"all locations\" mode** — so on Master Location it's correctly empty.\n- This matches CRA exactly: its `getLocationReviews` hits the same scoped endpoint and would also show 0 on Master Location.\n\nSo nothing's broken. To actually see the review data, there are two paths — and one needs a backend change:"}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1885,"cache_read_input_tokens":804295,"output_tokens":2932,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1885,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":2932,"cache_read_input_tokens":804295,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1885,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1885},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcX5su3XmXQmoLDFxfXGD","type":"assistant","uuid":"2cb36456-b58b-43b2-b90d-bafdaab0764d","timestamp":"2026-06-29T06:34:34.429Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-api","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.193","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"479f59ba-58b1-461b-a07e-981baca4de2d","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01EpNhacSxzAeqm7vUhkXnCY","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Leaving it as-is — the Reviews page is correct and matches CRA. It's scoped to the selected location; to view a given store's reviews, switch the location in the top-bar picker (Master Location has none of its own). No code change needed, nothing to commit.\n\n**Engage progress:** Tickets ✅, Reviews ✅, Messages ⊘. Remaining (all premium, subscription-gated): **Google Business**, **WhatsApp**, **WA Campaigns**, **WA Chat**.\n\nThese four share the `getFeatureAccess` gate (`isGmbEnabled`/`isWhatsappEnabled` + expiry, corporate bypass) — when the feature is off/expired the page should show an upgrade/expired state instead of data. They're also the heaviest Engage pages (GMB: review sync + AI replies; WhatsApp: chat + campaign builder).\n\nWant me to take **Google Business** next, or one of the WhatsApp pages?"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3023,"cache_read_input_tokens":806180,"output_tokens":460,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3023,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":460,"cache_read_input_tokens":806180,"cache_creation_input_tokens":3023,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":3023},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcX5xCZbQQvFMN7uVcR5p","type":"assistant","uuid":"e9622bcb-c117-4af1-be70-21043f335204","timestamp":"2026-06-29T06:35:02.031Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-api","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.193","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

{"parentUuid":"e1865151-83d2-4d68-9e19-16716696e5f1","isSidechain":false,"promptId":"5eaad177-2e27-4700-bd8d-4fb55f4fb69c","type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017d6WnH9ZQVAhh2KSxqi2Md","type":"tool_result","content":"import { Inject, Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { Repository } from 'typeorm';\nimport { Review } from './entities/review.entity';\nimport { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class ReviewsService {\n  constructor(\n    @InjectRepository(Review)\n    private readonly reviewRepository: Repository<Review>,\n  ) {\n    reviewRepository = this.reviewRepository;\n  }\n\n  async findByLocation(\n    locationId: number,\n    page: number,\n    limit: number,\n  ): Promise<Object> {\n    const rootQuery = this.reviewRepository\n      .createQueryBuilder('review')\n      .where('review.locationId = :locationId', { locationId });\n    const count = await rootQuery.getCount();\n    const reviews = await rootQuery\n      .cache(true)\n      .take(limit)\n      .skip((page - 1) * limit)\n      .orderBy('review.createdDate', 'DESC')\n      .getMany();\n    return { reviews, count };\n  }\n}","is_error":false}]},"uuid":"4a81fa46-8d71-47c9-97a4-ff8714981376","timestamp":"2026-06-29T06:35:49.085Z","toolUseResult":{"stdout":"import { Inject, Injectable } from '@nestjs/common';\nimport { Repository } from 'typeorm';\nimport { Review } from './entities/review.entity';\nimport { InjectRepository } from '@nestjs/typeorm';\n\n@Injectable()\nexport class ReviewsService {\n  constructor(\n    @InjectRepository(Review)\n    private readonly reviewRepository: Repository<Review>,\n  ) {\n    reviewRepository = this.reviewRepository;\n  }\n\n  async findByLocation(\n    locationId: number,\n    page: number,\n    limit: number,\n  ): Promise<Object> {\n    const rootQuery = this.reviewRepository\n      .createQueryBuilder('review')\n      .where('review.locationId = :locationId', { locationId });\n    const count = await rootQuery.getCount();\n    const reviews = await rootQuery\n      .cache(true)\n      .take(limit)\n      .skip((page - {"parentUuid":"9fb75942-68eb-4b3d-8cd6-ba0a1004ffc0","isSidechain":false,"message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-8","id":"msg_01MTJPCF7Yob9HoKJ9cdNTtT","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Right — a **503** means the API (or at least the `/reviews` route) is erroring/down. Go ahead and check it; my wiring is correct (I verified the endpoint and the `{reviews, count}` shape match the backend and CRA — it'll populate once the API is healthy).\n\nMeanwhile, this exposed a real UI bug worth fixing: my list pages show **\"No reviews yet\" (empty state) even when the request failed** — conflating an error with empty. Let me make failed loads show an honest error instead. I'll add an `error` state to the shared `DataTable` so every list page benefits."}],"stop_reason":"tool_use","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":62,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1621,"cache_read_input_tokens":825184,"output_tokens":1338,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1621,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":62,"output_tokens":1338,"cache_read_input_tokens":825184,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1621,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1621},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"diagnostics":null},"requestId":"req_011CcX6JMDJwMCrRdZ6F8Yd1","attributionMcpServer":"claude-in-chrome","attributionMcpTool":"javascript_tool","type":"assistant","uuid":"69fbdf30-ecfe-4dbc-a4b7-af11e5bfd083","timestamp":"2026-06-29T06:39:45.161Z","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-api","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.193","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

(\n58\t              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Connect the API to load data.</td></tr>\n59\t            ) : loading ? (\n60\t              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Loading…</td></tr>\n61\t            ) : rows.length === 0 ? (\n62\t              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">{emptyText}</td></tr>\n63\t            ) : ("}]},"uuid":"66746331-985a-4ad8-b2dc-ad02ab4240b6","timestamp":"2026-06-29T06:39:46.907Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/components/DataTable.tsx","content":"interface DataTableProps<T> {\n  columns: Column<T>[];\n  rows: T[];\n  getRowId: (row: T) => string;\n  configured: boolean;\n  loading: boolean;\n  page: number;\n  maxPage: number;\n  count: number;\n  onPage: (p: number) => void;\n  emptyText?: string;\n  countNoun?: string;\n}\n\nexport function DataTable<T>({\n  columns,\n  rows,\n  getRowId,\n  configured,\n  loading,\n  page,\n  maxPage,\n  count,\n  onPage,\n  emptyText = \"No records found.\",\n  countNoun = \"records\",\n}: DataTableProps<T>) {\n  const span = columns.length;\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"overflow-hidden\">\n      <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-[13.5px]\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"bg-surface-2 text-left text-[11.5px] uppercase tracking-wide text-ink-3\">\n              {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                <th\n                  key={i}\n                  className={cn(\"px-3 py-3 font-semibold\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right\", i === 0 && \"pl-5\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\", c.className)}\n                >\n                  {c.header}\n                </th>\n              ))}\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {!configured ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Connect the API to load data.</td></tr>\n            ) : loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Loading…</td></tr>\n            ) : rows.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">{emptyText}</td></tr>\n            ) : (","numLines":52,"startLine":12,"totalLines":156}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"7e4e2a9e-c6e7-49ab-bf16-151dacda1fd8","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-api","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.193","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

Please try again.\",\n  countNoun = \"records\",\n}: DataTableProps<T>) {","originalFile":"import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\n\nexport interface Column<T> {\n  header: string;\n  cell: (row: T) => React.ReactNode;\n  align?: \"right\";\n  className?: string;\n}\n\ninterface DataTableProps<T> {\n  columns: Column<T>[];\n  rows: T[];\n  getRowId: (row: T) => string;\n  configured: boolean;\n  loading: boolean;\n  page: number;\n  maxPage: number;\n  count: number;\n  onPage: (p: number) => void;\n  emptyText?: string;\n  countNoun?: string;\n}\n\nexport function DataTable<T>({\n  columns,\n  rows,\n  getRowId,\n  configured,\n  loading,\n  page,\n  maxPage,\n  count,\n  onPage,\n  emptyText = \"No records found.\",\n  countNoun = \"records\",\n}: DataTableProps<T>) {\n  const span = columns.length;\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"overflow-hidden\">\n      <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-[13.5px]\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"bg-surface-2 text-left text-[11.5px] uppercase tracking-wide text-ink-3\">\n              {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                <th\n                  key={i}\n                  className={cn(\"px-3 py-3 font-semibold\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right\", i === 0 && \"pl-5\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\", c.className)}\n                >\n                  {c.header}\n                </th>\n              ))}\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {!configured ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Connect the API to load data.</td></tr>\n            ) : loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Loading…</td></tr>\n            ) : rows.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">{emptyText}</td></tr>\n            ) : (\n              rows.map((row) => (\n                <tr key={getRowId(row)} className=\"border-t border-border hover:bg-surface-2\">\n                  {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                    <td\n                      key={i}\n                      className={cn(\"px-3 py-2.5\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right tnum\", i === 0 && \"pl-5 font-semibold\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\")}\n                    >\n                      {c.cell(row)}\n                    </td>\n                  ))}\n                </tr>\n              ))\n            )}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n\n      {configured && count > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 border-t border-border px-5 py-3\">\n          <span className=\"flex-1 text-xs text-ink-3\">\n            Page {page} of {maxPage} · {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")} {countNoun}\n          </span>\n          <PagerBtn disabled={page <= 1} onClick={() => onPage(Math.max(1, page - 1))}>\n            <ChevronLeft className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n          </PagerBtn>\n          <PagerBtn disabled={page >= maxPage} onClick={() => onPage(Math.min(maxPage, page + 1))}>\n            <ChevronRight className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n          </PagerBtn>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction PagerBtn({ disabled, onClick, children }: { disabled?: boolean; onClick?: () => void; children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  return (\n    <button\n      disabled={disabled}\n      onClick={onClick}\n      className={cn(\n        \"grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-md border border-border bg-surface text-ink-2\",\n        \"disabled:opacity-40 enabled:hover:bg-surface-2\"\n      )}\n    >\n      {children}\n    </button>\n  );\n}\n\n/** Shared list-page header with title, count and a debounce-friendly search box. */\nexport function ListHeader({\n  title,\n  subtitle,\n  search,\n  onSearch,\n  searching,\n  placeholder = \"Search…\",\n}: {\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string;\n  search: string;\n  onSearch: (v: string) => void;\n  searching?: boolean;\n  placeholder?: string;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex items-end justify-between\">\n      <div>\n        <h1 className=\"text-[25px] font-bold tracking-tight\">{title}</h1>\n        <p className=\"mt-1 text-sm text-ink-2\">{subtitle}</p>\n      </div>\n      <label className=\"flex items-center gap-2 rounded-full border border-border bg-surface px-3.5 py-2\">\n        <SearchIcon />\n        <input\n          value={search}\n          onChange={(e) => onSearch(e.target.value)}\n          placeholder={placeholder}\n          className=\"w-56 bg-transparent text-sm outline-none placeholder:text-ink-3\"\n        />\n        {searching && <span className=\"h-4 w-4 animate-spin rounded-full border-2 border-ink-3 border-t-transparent\" />}\n      </label>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction SearchIcon() {\n  return (\n    <svg className=\"h-4 w-4 text-ink-3\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"1.9\" strokeLinecap=\"round\">\n      <circle cx=\"11\" cy=\"11\" r=\"7\" /><line x1=\"21\" y1=\"21\" x2=\"16.65\" y2=\"16.65\" />\n    </svg>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":15,"oldLines":11,"newStart":15,"newLines":13,"lines":["   getRowId: (row: T) => string;","   configured: boolean;","   loading: boolean;","+  error?: (","originalFile":"import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/cn\";\nimport { Card } from \"@/components/ui/primitives\";\n\nexport interface Column<T> {\n  header: string;\n  cell: (row: T) => React.ReactNode;\n  align?: \"right\";\n  className?: string;\n}\n\ninterface DataTableProps<T> {\n  columns: Column<T>[];\n  rows: T[];\n  getRowId: (row: T) => string;\n  configured: boolean;\n  loading: boolean;\n  error?: boolean;\n  page: number;\n  maxPage: number;\n  count: number;\n  onPage: (p: number) => void;\n  emptyText?: string;\n  errorText?: string;\n  countNoun?: string;\n}\n\nexport function DataTable<T>({\n  columns,\n  rows,\n  getRowId,\n  configured,\n  loading,\n  error = false,\n  page,\n  maxPage,\n  count,\n  onPage,\n  emptyText = \"No records found.\",\n  errorText = \"Couldn’t load. Please try again.\",\n  countNoun = \"records\",\n}: DataTableProps<T>) {\n  const span = columns.length;\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"overflow-hidden\">\n      <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n        <table className=\"w-full text-[13.5px]\">\n          <thead>\n            <tr className=\"bg-surface-2 text-left text-[11.5px] uppercase tracking-wide text-ink-3\">\n              {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                <th\n                  key={i}\n                  className={cn(\"px-3 py-3 font-semibold\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right\", i === 0 && \"pl-5\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\", c.className)}\n                >\n                  {c.header}\n                </th>\n              ))}\n            </tr>\n          </thead>\n          <tbody>\n            {!configured ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Connect the API to load data.</td></tr>\n            ) : loading ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">Loading…</td></tr>\n            ) : rows.length === 0 ? (\n              <tr><td colSpan={span} className=\"px-5 py-12 text-center text-sm text-ink-3\">{emptyText}</td></tr>\n            ) : (\n              rows.map((row) => (\n                <tr key={getRowId(row)} className=\"border-t border-border hover:bg-surface-2\">\n                  {columns.map((c, i) => (\n                    <td\n                      key={i}\n                      className={cn(\"px-3 py-2.5\", c.align === \"right\" && \"text-right tnum\", i === 0 && \"pl-5 font-semibold\", i === span - 1 && \"pr-5\")}\n                    >\n                      {c.cell(row)}\n                    </td>\n                  ))}\n                </tr>\n              ))\n            )}\n          </tbody>\n        </table>\n      </div>\n\n      {configured && count > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 border-t border-border px-5 py-3\">\n          <span className=\"flex-1 text-xs text-ink-3\">\n            Page {page} of {maxPage} · {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")} {countNoun}\n          </span>\n          <PagerBtn disabled={page <= 1} onClick={() => onPage(Math.max(1, page - 1))}>\n            <ChevronLeft className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n          </PagerBtn>\n          <PagerBtn disabled={page >= maxPage} onClick={() => onPage(Math.min(maxPage, page + 1))}>\n            <ChevronRight className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n          </PagerBtn>\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction PagerBtn({ disabled, onClick, children }: { disabled?: boolean; onClick?: () => void; children: React.ReactNode }) {\n  return (\n    <button\n      disabled={disabled}\n      onClick={onClick}\n      className={cn(\n        \"grid h-8 w-8 place-items-center rounded-md border border-border bg-surface text-ink-2\",\n        \"disabled:opacity-40 enabled:hover:bg-surface-2\"\n      )}\n    >\n      {children}\n    </button>\n  );\n}\n\n/** Shared list-page header with title, count and a debounce-friendly search box. */\nexport function ListHeader({\n  title,\n  subtitle,\n  search,\n  onSearch,\n  searching,\n  placeholder = \"Search…\",\n}: {\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string;\n  search: string;\n  onSearch: (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)"}]},"uuid":"0c0b42e5-14de-4473-9317-88e00c384913","timestamp":"2026-06-29T06:40:21.368Z","toolUseResult":{"filePath":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-ui-v2/src/features/reviews/Reviews.tsx","oldString":"  const { data, isLoading } = useReviews(page, LIMIT);","newString":"  const { data, isLoading, isError } = useReviews(page, LIMIT);","originalFile":"import { useState } from \"react\";\nimport { isApiConfigured } from \"@/lib/apiClient\";\nimport { DataTable, type Column } from \"@/components/DataTable\";\nimport { useReviews, type Review } from \"./api\";\n\nconst LIMIT = 20;\nconst fmtDate = (raw?: string) => {\n  if (!raw) return \"—\";\n  const d = new Date(raw);\n  return isNaN(d.getTime()) ? raw : d.toLocaleDateString(\"en-IN\", { day: \"numeric\", month: \"short\", year: \"numeric\" });\n};\n\nexport function Reviews() {\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const configured = isApiConfigured();\n  const { data, isLoading } = useReviews(page, LIMIT);\n  const count = data?.count ?? 0;\n\n  const columns: Column<Review>[] = [\n    { header: \"Location\", cell: (r) => r.location?.name || (r.locationId != null ? `#${r.locationId}` : \"—\") },\n    { header: \"Date\", cell: (r) => fmtDate(r.createdDate) },\n    { header: \"Feedback\", cell: (r) => <span className=\"block max-w-[460px] whitespace-pre-wrap text-ink-2\">{r.review?.trim() || \"—\"}</span> },\n    { header: \"Customer\", cell: (r) => <span className=\"font-semibold\">{r.customerName || \"—\"}</span> },\n    { header: \"Phone\", cell: (r) => <span className=\"tnum\">{r.phone || \"—\"}</span> },\n  ];\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-5\">\n      <div className=\"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-[25px] font-bold tracking-tight\">Reviews</h1>\n        {configured && (\n          <span className=\"grid h-7 min-w-7 place-items-center rounded-full bg-surface-2 px-2 text-sm font-semibold text-ink-2\">\n            {count.toLocaleString(\"en-IN\")}\n          </span>\n        )}\n      </div>\n      <p className=\"-mt-2 text-sm text-ink-2\">Customer feedback collected from your stores.</p>\n\n      <DataTable\n        columns={columns}\n        rows={data?.reviews ?? []}\n        getRowId={(r) => String(r.id)}\n        configured={configured}\n        loading={isLoading}\n        page={page}\n        maxPage={Math.max(1, Math.ceil(count / LIMIT))}\n        count={count}\n        onPage={setPage}\n        emptyText=\"No reviews yet.\"\n        countNoun=\"reviews\"\n      />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":7,"newStart":13,"newLines":7,"lines":[" export function Reviews() {","   const [page, setPage] = useState(1);","   const configured = isApiConfigured();","-  const { data, isLoading } = useReviews(page, LIMIT);","+  const { data, isLoading, isError } = useReviews(page, LIMIT);","   const count = data?.count ?? 0;"," ","   const columns: Column<Review>[] = ["]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"9a3aa260-36f3-4b28-b81d-29a9a519ed08","userType":"external","entrypoint":"cli","cwd":"/Users/sameerjoshi/Documents/YumWeb/YumPOS/V2/yumpos-api","sessionId":"872ce0df-5798-42c6-8c8a-7c55b2e4a344","version":"2.1.193","gitBranch":"HEAD","slug":"snuggly-honking-sloth"}

raw : d.toLocaleDateString(\"en-IN\", { day: \"numeric\", month: \"short\", year: \"numeric\" });\n};\n\nexport function Reviews() {\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const configured = isApiConfigured();\n  const { data, isLoading, isError } = useReviews(page, LIMIT);\n  const count = data?.count ??
